title: AI agents can manage your passwords. Should we let them? Plus: The biggest Patch Tuesday ever.
summary: IBM podcast explores whether AI agents should manage user passwords, discussing cybersecurity hygiene, vulnerability patch management, and C-suite risk tolerance. Featured guests debate the readiness of AI agents for security automation and whether executives are overcorrecting after years of low-ROI security spending.
writeup: This IBM Technology podcast debates whether AI agents are ready to manage user passwords, weighing the cybersecurity hygiene gains against the risks of automating credential control. The discussion ties password management to broader vulnerability patch management, framed around a record Patch Tuesday, and examines C-suite risk tolerance. Guests disagree on whether AI agents are mature enough for security automation, and they question whether executives are overcorrecting after years of low-ROI security spending.
